fix_commands.title: Harden output encoding and HTML sanitization
fix_commands.rationale: XSS findings usually need contextual output encoding plus sanitizer coverage around user-controlled HTML.
fix_commands.safety_note: Apply to the affected frontend package and add a regression test for the vulnerable sink.

fix_commands.title: Enable CSRF token validation
fix_commands.rationale: State-changing routes should require an origin check and an unguessable CSRF token.
fix_commands.safety_note: Verify API clients send the token before enabling strict enforcement in production.

fix_commands.title: Replace permissive CORS with an allowlist
fix_commands.rationale: CORS misconfiguration is normally remediated by removing wildcard or reflected origins and checking credentials handling.
fix_commands.safety_note: Keep staging and production origins separate so test hosts do not become production-trusted origins.

fix_commands.title: Apply hardened browser security headers
fix_commands.rationale: Missing HSTS or frame protections are best fixed at the edge or middleware layer and verified with a header probe.
fix_commands.safety_note: Use a low HSTS max-age first if subdomain readiness is unknown.

fix_commands.title: Add object-level authorization checks
fix_commands.rationale: IDOR findings require server-side authorization checks on every object lookup, not client-side filtering.
fix_commands.safety_note: Add tests for same-tenant, cross-tenant, owner, and non-owner access paths.

fix_commands.title: Constrain outbound fetch targets
fix_commands.rationale: SSRF fixes should validate URL schemes, resolve and block private IP ranges, and deny cloud metadata hosts.
fix_commands.safety_note: Validate after DNS resolution and before each redirect follow.

fix_commands.title: Remove shell execution from user-controlled paths
fix_commands.rationale: Command injection remediation should replace shell strings with argument arrays and strict allowlists.
fix_commands.safety_note: Do not escape and keep using shell=True; move to structured subprocess APIs.

fix_commands.title: Enforce strict JWT validation
fix_commands.rationale: JWT issues commonly require a fixed algorithm allowlist, issuer/audience checks, and key rotation hygiene.
fix_commands.safety_note: Roll out key or issuer changes with a compatibility window for active sessions.
